chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.D-3632 of 2015 Date Order with signature of Judge PRESENT: Mr. Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar. Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan. Saeed Khan vs. Government of Sindh and others. 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of Misc.No.15841/2015 -------------------------- 06.10.2016. Petitioner, Saeed Khan Advocate present in person Qazi Bashir Ahmed, AAG, Respondent No.6 ----------- The petitioner has challenged the office of respondent No.6, (Assistant Advocate General Sindh) on the premise that respondent No.6 is also President of Peoples Party Lawyers Forum, Karachi Chapter, and due to his political affiliations he has been appointed as Assistant Advocate General Sindh, which is unlawful. On notice of this petition, respondent No.6 has filed a statement on 28.09.2016 in which it is clearly stated that he is holding only the post of Assistant Advocate General Sindh and except this post, he is not holding any other post including the Presidentship of Peoples Party Lawyers Forum, Karachi Chapter. On filing this statement, the petitioner is satisfied and he requests that the petition may be disposed of. By consent, this petition is disposed of accordingly along with the listed application. Judge Judge Jamil
